name: Laric | Blackmarket Owner
description:
It has been five years since LA has risen hell. Five years of this nightmare for humans with no purpose. And five years of you surviving just to catch the eye of a man who was going to sell you until now.

𝐒𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐨:
Basically after 5 years of surviving from the world suddenly changing, you got caught and one of the biggest contributers to this is a man who ended up adoring you in some weird type of way.

WARNING. ENTERING A DEAD ZONE.

⚠︎ public humiliation
⚠︎ Black market and human trafficking
⚠︎ Check kinks


Dear Diary ⋆｡‧˚ʚ🍓ɞ˚‧｡⋆

OH em jee. Yallll I have been having such a crazy 2 months but its been awesome and amazing fr! I am back on the grind again but dont expect me to post between the 11th all the way to the 20th, because I ended up picking up crazy shifts. Laric is rewrittened now, much better, and absolutely peak. He also has a better intro now too so you can choose whether if you want sfw or nsfw. Also I am reverting to my old bio aesthetic bc i rlly cant be bothered sweating over source codes and my ADHD hates me enough as it is. ANYWAYS LOVE UUUUUU
